name: Rich'n' Creamy Squares
recipeIngredient: 18.25 ounce Duncan Hines yellow cake mix (or 1 box 18.25 ounces Duncan Hines Devil's Food cake mix)
½ cup Butter Flavor Crisco, melted
recipeInstructions:
- Preheat oven to 350°F.
- Grease a 13x9x2 inch pan with Butter Flavor Crisco and set aside.
- For the base: In a large bowl, combine cake mix, eggs, melted Butter Flavor Crisco, and milk. Mix until just moistened. Add pecans and stir gently. Turn batter into prepared pan and spread evenly.
- For the topping: In another large bowl, beat cream cheese until smooth. Beat in 2 eggs, then gradually add sugar and vanilla until smooth. Spread topping evenly over base.
- Bake for 35 minutes, or until edges and top are light golden brown and slightly shiny. Allow to cool completely before cutting into squares (about 1 ½ x 1 ½ inches each).
- Makes 4 dozen bars.
